reachability_artifacts: built sworn maintainability review run in a temporary local-plus-bare-remote repository proving exact Baton prompt plus structured overlay validation, exact empty-scope zero-dispatch PASS, engine provenance injection, commit, push-failure, restart reuse with zero redispatch, exact push completion, and paired exit behavior

built sworn maintainability adjudicate run proving explicit Coach decision/rationale/identity/permissions, evidence-derived citations, command-captured immutable time, and missing/inferred-input rejection
built sworn maintainability cutover run on a temporary verified T1/T2 release-wt proving the sole native planning-to-current commit, push-only recovery, and premature/divergent/downgrade rejection
release_benefit: Sworn itself becomes the restart-safe authority for the complete bounded maintainability transition.

design_decisions.choice: Give dedicated maintainability commands ownership of validation, report and ledger writes, the transition commit, and the exact track push.
options: stateful command owns the complete durability boundary
command commits and the surrounding role pushes
role session authors every record and Git effect
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified by Brad (Coach), 2026-07-15: sworn maintainability review and adjudicate are the sole public authorities and own commit-plus-push recovery.
design_decisions.rationale: The transition owner must make record identity and machine-to-machine durability one restartable operation.

design_decisions.choice: Activate current protocol authority only after S13 is freshly verified and T1 then T2 are integrated, before any T5/T6 branch exists.
options: post-T2 release-wt activation before downstream tracks
activate inside the T2 owner before verification
mark the plan current before the conformant engine exists
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's 2026-07-16 instruction to proceed with the orchestrator recommendation: S13 owns the sole post-T2 planning-to-current cutover and committed-only recovery boundary.
design_decisions.rationale: This preserves manual fresh verification of the self-hosting engine, prevents marker mismatch during T2 integration, and gives every automated downstream track one identical current base.

design_decisions.choice: Keep Coach judgment explicit while deriving report identities and time from committed evidence and the command boundary.
options: typed split between Coach inputs and derived evidence
let callers supply the complete adjudication record
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's 2026-07-16 instruction to proceed with the orchestrator recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: Human intent, cryptographic evidence identity, and machine time have different authorities and must not be inferred from one another.

design_decisions.choice: Independently reconstruct every consumed sealed bootstrap reconciliation authorization and interval, require manifest-declaration/observed-evidence set equality, and retire planning-only recognition at cutover.
options: carry the exception into current authority
reconstruct exact evidence and retire it at cutover
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's standing instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: exact historical recognition may preserve bootstrap evidence only until C-13 activates current authority.
design_decisions.rationale: Automated authority must prove the exact owning slice, endpoints, purpose and exceptional tuples for all and only the bootstrap evidence actually consumed, and must not inherit a reusable manual-merge waiver.

positive_scenarios: A valid overlay-conformant PASS or FAIL is durably committed and pushed once; empty scope produces exact deterministic PASS with zero dispatch; explicit Coach adjudication preserves its authority; push-only restart reuses exact evidence without another model call.

Cutover reproduces the sealed manifest digest, every consumed authorization/interval/merge/parent/base/path/mode/blob tuple, and exact declared-versus-observed set equality, then makes planning-only recognition unavailable as authority becomes current.
negative_scenarios: Invalid bootstrap/overlay evidence, missing or inferred Coach inputs, caller overrides, dirty state, rewritten evidence, or ambiguous recovery blocks before unauthorized dispatch or mutation.

Any authorization widening, sealed-manifest extension, declared/observed set mismatch, digest or tuple mismatch, missing consumed entry, or attempt to retain the exception after cutover blocks without mutation.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: One durable command authority closes the gap between correct review output and trustworthy cross-session lifecycle state.
